compute_units.page_throughput: ~3000 pages/CU on CheerioCrawler (HTTP); ~300 pages/CU on browser/Playwright

components.scheduler: first-class (Actor schedules cron-style, retries, webhook callbacks)
components.observability: Apify Console — logs, datasets, statistics, alerts, integrations with Slack/email
components.actor_marketplace: 1500+ Actors (incl. brasil-scrapers/quinto-andar-api already used by Epic 6 candidate set)
components.anti_bot: Apify Proxy + fingerprinting; ImovelWeb (DataDome) is HARD on this surface — same problem self-hosted faces

operational_realities: Maintenance: vendor-managed Actor SDK upgrades, runtime patches
Lock-in: Actor format is Apify-specific, BUT Crawlee code under the hood is portable
Per-page cost dominated by CU + proxy, not seat license
